title: Leaf Blower Cordless Turbo Mode 500000RPM 21V Air Blower 5 Gears with 2 X 4.0Ah Battery and Charger Lightweight 180°Rotation for Lawn Yard Garage Patio Blowing Leaves and Dust
features: NEW TWO-IN-ONE DESIGN, TWO MODES : Our battery powered leaf blower are designed for maximum flexibility, supports 180°free rotation, and can switch between horizontal and vertical modes at will. Maiproo garden blowers cordless can easily sweep away fallen leaves at low places and dust at high places according to needs, making every corner clean as new, and cleaning becomes easier!

EFFICIENT AND POWERFUL MOTOR:This leaf blower cordless uses axial fan technology, releasing up to 1189m³/h of wind to blow away accumulated fallen leaves instantly. Equipped with an efficient 500000RPM brushless motor, it has long-lasting and powerful power. It also has an ultra-long service life and low noise. Whether it is cleaning up fallen leaves in the yard or blowing dust from gaps, it can be easily done, saving you a lot of time and energy.

21V 2*4.0Ah BATTERY: Our battery leaf blower comes with two powerful 21V 4.0Ah lithium batteries, wireless design, free from the constraints of wires, allowing you to freely shuttle every corner of the yard, from the fence to the big tree, cleaning is convenient! . The cordless leaf blower with battery and charger runs for up to 30 minutes on high speed (15 minutes per battery) and up to 2 hours on low speed (1 hour per battery)

5 ADJUSTABLE SPEEDS : Our cordless leaf blower provides 5 wind speeds, from 193km/h(1st gear) to 322+km/h( 5th gear), super wind force enables efficient and flexible operation. You can adjust to the appropriate gear to clean lawns, yards, garages, etc. according to different cleaning needs.

LIGHTWEIGHT, ERGONOMIC DESIGN : This electric leaf blower is lighter than traditional leaf blowers, weighing only 1.8kg. It adopts ergonomic design, comfortable and non-slip, which can reduce fatigue during long-term use.
